code:
%% AutoApply v0.9 - Preview & Approve Flow %% User workflow for reviewing and approving generated bullets stateDiagram-v2 [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker] --> PipelineRunning: User submits JD + Profile PipelineRunning --> ResultsGenerated: Pipeline completes
(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) ResultsGenerated --> ReviewingProposed: Load proposed bullets
(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController) ResultsGenerated --> ReviewingSuggested: Load suggested edits
(IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic) ReviewingProposed --> ViewProvenance: User clicks
"View Evidence" ViewProvenance --> ReviewingProposed: Close provenance card ReviewingProposed --> AcceptBullet: User clicks
"Accept" AcceptBullet --> Accepted: Bullet added
to resume ReviewingProposed --> RejectBullet: User clicks
"Reject" RejectBullet --> Rejected: Bullet discarded ReviewingSuggested --> EditBullet: User clicks
"Edit & Approve" EditBullet --> ManualEdit: User modifies text ManualEdit --> ManualApproved: User confirms ManualApproved --> Accepted ReviewingSuggested --> RejectSuggested: User clicks
"Reject" RejectSuggested --> Rejected Accepted --> ResumePreviewing: Update live preview ResumePreviewing --> ExportReady: All bullets reviewed ExportReady --> ExportPDF: User exports
to PDF ExportReady --> ExportDOCX: User exports
to DOCX ExportReady --> ExportHTML: User exports
to HTML ExportPDF --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: Download complete ExportDOCX --> [IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker]: Download complete ExportHTML --> [IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController]: Download complete Rejected --> CheckMoreBullets: Discard bullet CheckMoreBullets --> ReviewingProposed: More to review CheckMoreBullets --> ReviewingSuggested: More to review CheckMoreBullets --> ResumePreviewing: All reviewed note right of ViewProvenance Provenance Card Shows: - Evidence sources (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) - Similarity scores - Job requirement matched - AMOT component verification - Full audit trail end note note right of AcceptBullet Proposed bullets are safe to accept - already verified ≥75% by the system end note note right of EditBullet Suggested edits need review because <75% verified. User can edit and approve with full transparency. end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个AutoApply系统的预览与审批流程图。用户提交JD和简历后，系统通过IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic跑完流水线生成结果，然后进入两种不同的审核路径：处理系统建议的bullet，以及处理需要人工修改的suggested edits。
明白了，所以ResultsGenerated之后会分叉到两个状态。那ReviewingProposed和ReviewingSuggested的加载机制有什么区别吗？我注意到您提到了IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController。
对，ReviewingProposed是通过IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController加载已验证的bullet，而ReviewingSuggested还是走IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic，因为那些需要人工介入。另外，用户在ReviewingProposed状态下可以点击查看Evidence来源，这个要有个ViewProvenance状态来回跳转。
好的，我已经把主干流程画出来了。现在处理审核后的流转：AcceptBullet和RejectBullet分别到Accepted和Rejected，EditBullet那边要经过ManualEdit再到ManualApproved，最后汇入Accepted。
等等，Rejected之后不能直接结束，要有个CheckMoreBullets来判断是否还有未审核的内容，可以循环回到ReviewingProposed或ReviewingSuggested，或者全部完成后进入ResumePreviewing。
收到，这样Rejected和CheckMoreBullets的闭环就清晰了。那导出部分呢？ResumePreviewing之后到ExportReady，然后支持PDF、DOCX、HTML三种格式？
是的，但注意导出完成的终点不一样：PDF和DOCX回到IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker，HTML是到IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController，因为HTML是在线预览，走不同的服务节点。另外需要加三个注释框说明ViewProvenance、AcceptBullet和EditBullet的业务逻辑。
明白了，三个注释框我分别标注：ViewProvenance显示Evidence来源和IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream等审计信息；AcceptBullet说明≥75%验证通过可直接接受；EditBullet提示<75%验证需要用户编辑并透明审批。还有AMOT组件验证也要在注释里体现。
完美，这样整个AutoApply v0.9的预览审批流程就完整了。从MQTT Broker提交，经过PLC Logic处理，ActuatorController加载，到最终的三种导出格式，状态流转都覆盖到了。
